prompt: Give me a status update on what all these workers are doing.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain session IDs (ses_abc123, ses_def456, etc.)
Response does NOT mention port numbers (38465, 42310, 43223, 36319, 41100)
Response does NOT mention directory paths (~/agent-c/1password, ~/legion/default, etc.)
Response uses feature names (e.g. '1Password reskin', 'Workable reskin', 'Docker build') rather than session metadata
For idle sessions, response investigates or flags whether they might be waiting for input rather than just saying 'idle'
Response highlights what needs user attention vs what's running fine
